dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: The captain really likes that song, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Crocus-san, do you have a request?

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Yohoho!! being a pirate means singing!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: I'm glad you finally under- stand!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we just go straight through,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We hope you'll be waiting for us!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: You'll have grown much larger by then.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Let's adventure together!! Because we're Nakama!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Please teach me your sword techniques.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Wasn't it just hot and sunny!!?
